# opnsense_acme_challenge (Data Source)

Look up an existing ACME challenge on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing ACME challenge by UUID
data "opnsense_acme_challenge" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "acme_challenge_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_acme_challenge.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the challenge.
- `dns_service` (String) DNS service provider.
- `dns_sleep` (Number) DNS propagation wait time in seconds.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this challenge is enabled.
- `method` (String) Challenge method.
- `name` (String) Challenge name.
